title: Write a README
description: Create a README that gets a new user productive fast.
content:
Write a README for this project: {{project}}

Structure: one-line description, what problem it solves, quick start (install + minimal working example), common usage, configuration, and where to get help. Lead with the example a user can copy-paste to see it work. Keep prose tight; show, don't tell. Omit sections that don't apply rather than padding them.

variables.name: project
variables.description: What the project is and does
